semantic.role: ESLint flat configuration module defining static analysis rules for TypeScript source files in the ArchSpine project.
responsibilities: Defines linting rules for TypeScript files in src/services/, src/tasks/, src/infra/, src/engines/, and src/utils/ directories.
Composes recommended ESLint configurations from @eslint/js, typescript-eslint, and eslint-config-prettier.
Configures ECMAScript version and module source type for the linter.
Enforces coding standards including no unused variables, const preference, strict equality, and mandatory curly braces.
outOfScope: Does not configure linting for test files or root-level TypeScript files.
Does not define custom rules beyond the composed recommended configs.
invariants: The configuration must always be exported as a default array via tseslint.config().
The files pattern must target only TypeScript files under src/ subdirectories.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish a centralized, composable ESLint configuration for the ArchSpine project to enforce consistent code quality and style across all TypeScript source modules.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Fix lint warnings and type errors, and add CI workflow integration.

semantic.driftReason: Previous semantic contract included test files (tests/ directory) in the linting scope, but the current AST shows only src/ subdirectories (services, tasks, infra, engines, utils). The file no longer applies to test files.

English.role: ESLint flat configuration module defining static analysis rules for TypeScript source files in the ArchSpine project.
responsibilities: Defines linting rules for TypeScript files in src/services/, src/tasks/, src/infra/, src/engines/, and src/utils/ directories.
Composes recommended ESLint configurations from @eslint/js, typescript-eslint, and eslint-config-prettier.
Configures ECMAScript version and module source type for the linter.
Enforces coding standards including no unused variables, const preference, strict equality, and mandatory curly braces.
outOfScope: Does not configure linting for test files or root-level TypeScript files.
Does not define custom rules beyond the composed recommended configs.

Simplified Chinese.role: ESLint 扁平配置模块，为 ArchSpine 项目中的 TypeScript 源文件定义静态分析规则。
responsibilities: 为 src/services/、src/tasks/、src/infra/、src/engines/ 和 src/utils/ 目录中的 TypeScript 文件定义 lint 规则。
组合来自 @eslint/js、typescript-eslint 和 eslint-config-prettier 的推荐 ESLint 配置。
配置 linter 的 ECMAScript 版本和模块源类型。
强制执行编码标准，包括禁止未使用变量、优先使用 const、严格相等和强制使用花括号。
outOfScope: 不配置测试文件或根级 TypeScript 文件的 lint 规则。
不定义超出组合推荐配置的自定义规则。
